name: Naloxone
description: Asọmpi opioid nnabata antagonist. Ngwa ngwa na-atụgharị opioid-ebutere ịda mbà n'obi iku ume, nkwụsịtụ, na analgesia. Mmalite IV: 2 min, IM: 5 min, IN: 8-13 min. Ogologo oge dị mkpụmkpụ karịa ọtụtụ opioids -- enwere ike ịchọọ usoro ọgwụgwọ ugboro ugboro.
indications: Opioid ịdoụbiga mmanya ókè ma ọ bụ ịda mbà n'obi iku ume
Mgbanwe nke ịhịa aka n'ahụ opioid
A na-enyo enyo ihe ọghọm opioid
dose: 0.4-2 mg IV/IO/IM/IN. Tinyegharịa q2-3 min dị ka achọrọ. Oke 10mg. Intranasal (IN): 2mg kwa imi.
contraindications: Enweghị contraindications zuru oke na ntọala ịdoụbiga mmanya ókè
warnings: Ogologo oge omume (30-90 min) dị mkpụmkpụ karịa ọtụtụ opioids - onye ọrịa nwere ike ịmaliteghachi narcotize. Nyochaa opekata mpe otu awa ka ọgwụ ikpeazụ gachara.
Na-ebute nnukwu mwepu opioid -- nwere ike ịkpata mkpasu iwe, tachycardia, edema akpa ume na ndị ọrịa dabere na opioid.
Ọ ga - ewepụ analgesia - onye ọrịa nwere ike ị nweta ezigbo ọgụ site na mgbu.

pediatric.dose: 0.01 mg/kg IV/IM/IN (max 0.4 mg). Tinyegharịa q2-3 min PRN.
pediatric.note: Nwa ọhụrụ: 0.01 mg / kg maka ngbanwe nke opioid nne.

obstetric.note: Nchekwa na ime ime. Ọ bụrụ na enyere nne na-eru nso ka a na-amụ nwa, nyochaa nwa ọhụrụ maka iwepụ ya.
